title: ПО ВОГОНЬ
author: Vitaliy
description: Vadym Olehovych Sukharevskyi (Ukrainian: Вадим Олегович Сухаревський), callsign Badger (Ukrainian: Борсук, romanized: Borsuk ; born 6 October 1984), is a colonel of the Armed Forces of Ukraine. He had served as Commander of the Unmanned Systems Forces and Deputy Commander-in-Chief of the Armed Forces of Ukraine since 2024 to 2025.
